message:
chore(beads): ft-xbnl0.2.4 tick 422 — mpsc::Receiver::recv cancel contract

Attaches tick-422 progress comment describing the new
mpsc_recv_with_cx_observes_pre_cancel test (commit ab243527). Completes
the long-lived wait primitive cancel matrix across all four channel
types (oneshot + broadcast + semaphore + mpsc). Local count 95/95
across 6 runs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
